pre_game.message: Hey, I’m G. It’s a bit intense in here, isn’t it? I figured I’d say hi and see how you’re holding up before things get started.
Hi G, I’m I. Yeah, it’s definitely a bit much in here. I’m doing okay, just trying to stay focused. How are you holding up?
I'm hanging in there, just a bit jittery. I'm really focused on bringing something back for my family, so the pressure is on. What about you—any big plans for the money if you win?
I totally get that. I'm in the same boat—just want to take care of the people I love and set us up for a better future.
It’s good to know I'm not the only one here for those reasons. It definitely makes the pressure feel more worth it.
Definitely. It’s the best motivation there is. How many people are you looking out for back home?
It’s mainly my parents and my younger brother. They’ve been through a lot, so I really want to come through for them. How about you?
For me, it’s my partner and my parents. They’ve always had my back, so I really want to give them some financial peace of mind.
That’s a solid reason to be here. Peace of mind is priceless, and it definitely keeps you focused when things get tough.
Exactly. It was really good meeting you, G. I'm going to go say hi to some other people now, but I wish you the best of luck.
Nice meeting you too, I. Best of luck to you and your family—hope we both find a way to make it happen. See you around!
